title: Origins: Omnix/Omnitrix
description: Before Azmuth created Omnitrix, There was a beta version and it was tested with a strange DNA system called Origins.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Omnix

Before Azmuth created Omnitrix, There was a beta version and it was tested with a strange DNA system called Origins.

## Core Ability
- 💫Transform!!
  - Using (Primary Active) can Change yourself to the Origin that written on the Enchanted Book you holding. 60 seconds duration, 120 seconds cooldown. You can't change to other origin in this duration.

## Core System
- 🧬Origin Writer
  - When Hit Target with and Enchanted Book, You can rewrite it to the target Origin.  You will spawn with 3 empty Enchanted Book.
    - Some Vanilla mobs can get default Origins.

<details>
<summary>Custom Origin you can get here</summary>
  
# Kitsune (fox)

**You are one of the ancient fox spirits, both respected and feared by many. What will you do with your heritage, and the power it brings?**

> There have Normal version and white version of **Kitsune**
## Passives

- 💨Swifty mobility
  - You run 40% faster, and jump 3 block higher when sneaking. You take no fall damage.
- 🤫Sneaky
  - Sculk Sensor won't detect you from landing, walking and running.
- 🍒Favorite Food
  - Berries are more saturation on you.
- 📜Ancient Spirits
  - You have Particles around you when moving.
- 📜Ancient Lives
  - You have 30% less health.

![Kitsune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jFy3kzIp/images/8995051d9e42e28048f5413fd525d1496244c09c.png)
</details>
